calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Peition
Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREA D. MCGARY OF THE MCGRARY FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-415-874-3500 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT BY COURT CALL APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner The Nob Hill Lambourne Owners' Association's petition to approve the First Amendment to Declaration of Covenants, Conditions, and Restrictions, as stated in Exhibit B to the Petition, is granted on the condition that the First Amendment shall have no effect on the lawsuit captioned Danker v. Nob Hill Lambourne Owners' Association, No. 542022. Petitioner has demonstrated compliance with Civil Code 4275(a-e). The amendment, which reduces the percentage of votes needed to pass an amendment to the Declaration of Covenants, Conditions, and Restrictions, is reasonable. (Fourth La Costa Condominium Owners Ass'n v. Seth (2008) 159 Cal.App.4th 563.) Sandra Coudright's opposition to the petition is mooted by the condition that the First Amendment shall have no effect on the Danker case. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
